name: property managers managing 5–15 employees tool
description: For property managers managing 5–15 employees, manual tracking of certification renewals causes missed deadlines. We automate tracking and reporting instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and reporting employee certification renewals.
